summary: The MassBank of North America (MoNA) has an EI library available for download at https://mona.fiehnlab.ucdavis.edu/downloads.
The MoNA EI library file has SMILES information in the Comment field rather than the SMILES field.
The SMILES in MoNA EI library must be extracted from the Comment field and put into the SMILES field using the reorganize_mona function.
